response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics for 'Baka Mitai' provided in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics and scene transitions. Manual transcription and translation were used for the talk segments and on-screen merchandise details. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synchronized to vocal bursts. Rapid-fire banter in the talk segment was handled with aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions. Prominent on-screen text for merchandise, stream times, and playful captions (like the tumbleweed) was included to ensure contextual completeness.
